action.reasoning: The root task is to create a complete business plan with five major components. This is too large for a single EXECUTE action and requires parallel decomposition. I will spawn five subtasks, one for each component of the business plan, and take on the integration role myself to assemble the final document.

subtasks.goal: Conduct market analysis for a Korean local-review platform.
subtasks.capsule: Analyze the Korean local services market, including size, growth trends, user demographics, and key drivers. Focus on the demand for local reviews in Korea, cultural nuances, and regulatory environment. This feeds the overall business plan's market context.

outputs.description: Comprehensive market analysis for Korean local-review platform

subtasks.goal: Conduct competitor analysis for the Korean local-review space.
subtasks.capsule: Identify and analyze existing competitors in Korea (e.g., Naver Place, Google Maps, Daum, specialized review sites). Assess their strengths, weaknesses, market share, and gaps. This informs positioning and differentiation strategy.

outputs.description: Detailed competitor analysis of Korean local-review platforms

subtasks.goal: Design the revenue model for the Korean local-review platform.
subtasks.capsule: Propose monetization strategies suitable for the Korean market, such as advertising, premium listings, lead generation, data services, or affiliate partnerships. Include pricing assumptions and revenue mix projections.

outputs.description: Revenue model and monetization strategy for the platform

subtasks.goal: Develop a go-to-market strategy for the Korean local-review platform.
subtasks.capsule: Define user acquisition channels, marketing tactics, partnership strategies, and launch plan tailored to Korean consumers and local businesses. Include growth loops and community-building approaches.

outputs.description: Go-to-market strategy including acquisition, marketing, and launch plan

subtasks.goal: Create financial projections for the Korean local-review platform.
subtasks.capsule: Build a 5-year financial model including revenue forecasts, cost structure, unit economics, break-even analysis, and funding requirements. Base assumptions on the market, competitor, and revenue model analyses.

self_role.goal: Integrate all subtask outputs into a cohesive, polished business plan document.

outputs.description: Final integrated business plan for Korean local-review platform
